sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(255), xml_data XML);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, xml_data) VALUES (1, 'Hello', xml_tree_doc('1'));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, xml_data) VALUES (2, NULL, xml_tree_doc('2'));
SELECT id, data, xml_data FROM test_table WHERE xml_data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, data, xml_tree_doc('<root><c>' || COALESCE(data, 'default') || '</c></root>') AS transformed_xml FROM test_table;
SELECT id, data FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_table t2 WHERE t2.data = test_table.data) AND xml_data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY data HAVING COUNT(data) > 1;
SELECT data, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY data ORDER BY id) AS row_num FROM test_table;
SELECT unimport_clr(vector(data), vector(data)) FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, xml_tree_doc('<root><d>' || data || '</d></root>') AS xml_doc FROM test_table) AS subquery WHERE xml_doc IS NOT NULL;
SELECT data, xml_tree_doc('<root><e>' || CAST(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS VARCHAR) || '</e></root>') FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
